TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Haiti_a_kanatal, title = Haiti_a_kanatal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Haiti_a_kanatal} }

S.FORM: Haiti a kanatal (u kamu nu Hulam:śĶ∑ŚúįŚúčŚģ∂) kakiliman Republique d'HaitiÔľõu "Repulik Ayiti han pangangan ku Haiti, u kitizaan i Caribbean Sea a subal a kanatal. mamini i Caribbean Sea sakatusa tabakiay a subal Hispaniola a subal "Haiti" hanca, i satip atu timulan, nuwalian malalitin tu Dominican Republic. Haiti a tademaw nau Arwak a tademawan, nani debungan nu Spain haw sa u yincumin kalamkam satu mawada katukuh ayza malawpes tu, u midebungay a tademaw a micunus tu mikawaway satu katuud ku nipacumud tu Africa lumeniay a kuli, Haiti namakayza mala u lemeniay tu a tademaw nu kanatal, Palekal tu sakaluk kalisiw. u Haiti i kanatal u saayaway cayay kau lumeniay a tademaw, u kuli ku palekalay misanga'ay tu kanatal, atu Calibbean Sea a kakitizaan u saayaway masacacayay a kakitizaan. i 2012 a mihcaan, Haiti sakamu sa sibalucu' a mikilim tu i African Union misiluc tu tatizengan nu sakaput a tademaw.Haiti u America uyza dada' u lumeniay a tademaw ku paayaway nu binacadan pakala tu 90% ku Republic. satuway, uynian a kanatal atu belaway Latino ku tapang u Dominican sapalahad sa masazuma caay kalecad, Haiti a Amilika‚Äé u sapakuyuca a kanatal, 2015 a mihcaan tademaw paymihcaan nilaculan a kalisiw 804, u saadidi'ay nisulitan tu nipalahadan nu tademaw, i titakit u saadidiay nipatadasan a kanatal a cacay. 2019 a mihacaan, Haiti a tademaw palalecad tu kabalaki niuzip a mihcaan 64 ku mihcaan.
S.PHON: ńßaiti a kanatar~…ĺ (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:****) kakir~…ĺiman *…ôpubr~…ĺi*u…ô d Ē~ °ńßaiti*u "*…ôpur~…ĺik ajiti ńßan paŇčaŇčan ku ńßaiti, u kitizaan i ¶aribb…ôan s…ôa a subar~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺ. mamini i ¶aribb…ôan s…ôa sakatusa tabakiaj a subar~…ĺ ńßispanior~…ĺa a subar~…ĺ "ńßaiti" ńßan ¶a, i satip atu timur~…ĺan, nuwar~…ĺian mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu domini ¶an *…ôpubr~…ĺi ¶. ńßaiti a tad…ômaw nau arwak a tad…ômawan, nani d…ôbuŇčan nu spain ńßaw sa u jin ¶umin kar~…ĺamkam satu mawada katukuńß ajza mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu, u mid…ôbuŇčaj a tad…ômaw a mi ¶unus tu mikawawaj satu katuud ku nipa ¶umud tu afri ¶a r~…ĺum…ôniaj a kur~…ĺi, ńßaiti namakajza mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺ…ôm…ôniaj tu a tad…ômaw nu kanatar~…ĺ, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakar~…ĺuk kar~…ĺisiw. u ńßaiti i kanatar~…ĺ u saajawaj ¶ajaj kau r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw, u kur~…ĺi ku par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu kanatar~…ĺ, atu ¶ar~…ĺibb…ôan s…ôa a kakitizaan u saajawaj masa ¶a ¶ajaj a kakitizaan. i **** a mińß ¶aan, ńßaiti sakamu sa sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a mikir~…ĺim tu i afri ¶an union misir~…ĺu ¶ tu tatiz…ôŇčan nu sakaput a tad…ômaw.ńßaiti u am…ôri ¶a ujza dada Ē~ ° u r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw ku paajawaj nu bina ¶adan pakar~…ĺa tu **% ku *…ôpubr~…ĺi ¶. satuwaj, ujnian a kanatar~…ĺ atu b…ôr~…ĺawaj r~…ĺatino ku tapaŇč u domini ¶an sapar~…ĺańßad sa masazuma ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ńßaiti a amir~…ĺika* u sapakuju ¶a a kanatar~…ĺ, **** a mińß ¶aan tad…ômaw pajmińß ¶aan nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan a kar~…ĺisiw ***, u saadidi Ē~ °aj nisur~…ĺitan tu nipar~…ĺańßadan nu tad…ômaw, i titakit u saadidiaj nipatadasan a kanatar~…ĺ a ¶a ¶aj. **** a mińßa ¶aan, ńßaiti a tad…ômaw par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kabar~…ĺaki niuzip a mińß ¶aan ** ku mińß ¶aan.
S.FORM: Haiti a kanatal (u kamu nu Hulam:śĶ∑ŚúįŚúčŚģ∂) kakiliman Republique d'HaitiÔľõu "Repulik Ayiti han pangangan ku Haiti, u kitizaan i Caribbean Sea a subal a kanatal. mamini i Caribbean Sea sakatusa tabakiay a subal Hispaniola a subal "Haiti" hanca, i satip atu timulan, nuwalian malalitin tu Dominican Republic. Haiti a tademaw nau Arwak a tademawan, nani debungan nu Spain haw sa u yincumin kalamkam satu mawada katukuh ayza malawpes tu, u midebungay a tademaw a micunus tu mikawaway satu katuud ku nipacumud tu Africa lumeniay a kuli, Haiti namakayza mala u lemeniay tu a tademaw nu kanatal, Palekal tu sakaluk kalisiw. u Haiti i kanatal u saayaway cayay kau lumeniay a tademaw, u kuli ku palekalay misanga'ay tu kanatal, atu Calibbean Sea a kakitizaan u saayaway masacacayay a kakitizaan. i 2012 a mihcaan, Haiti sakamu sa sibalucu' a mikilim tu i African Union misiluc tu tatizengan nu sakaput a tademaw.Haiti u America uyza dada' u lumeniay a tademaw ku paayaway nu binacadan pakala tu 90% ku Republic. satuway, uynian a kanatal atu belaway Latino ku tapang u Dominican sapalahad sa masazuma caay kalecad, Haiti a Amilika‚Äé u sapakuyuca a kanatal, 2015 a mihcaan tademaw paymihcaan nilaculan a kalisiw 804, u saadidi'ay nisulitan tu nipalahadan nu tademaw, i titakit u saadidiay nipatadasan a kanatal a cacay. 2019 a mihacaan, Haiti a tademaw palalecad tu kabalaki niuzip a mihcaan 64 ku mihcaan.
S.PHON: ńßaiti a kanatar~…ĺ (u kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam:****) kakir~…ĺiman *…ôpubr~…ĺi*u…ô d Ē~ °ńßaiti*u "*…ôpur~…ĺik ajiti ńßan paŇčaŇčan ku ńßaiti, u kitizaan i ¶aribb…ôan s…ôa a subar~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺ. mamini i ¶aribb…ôan s…ôa sakatusa tabakiaj a subar~…ĺ ńßispanior~…ĺa a subar~…ĺ "ńßaiti" ńßan ¶a, i satip atu timur~…ĺan, nuwar~…ĺian mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu domini ¶an *…ôpubr~…ĺi ¶. ńßaiti a tad…ômaw nau arwak a tad…ômawan, nani d…ôbuŇčan nu spain ńßaw sa u jin ¶umin kar~…ĺamkam satu mawada katukuńß ajza mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu, u mid…ôbuŇčaj a tad…ômaw a mi ¶unus tu mikawawaj satu katuud ku nipa ¶umud tu afri ¶a r~…ĺum…ôniaj a kur~…ĺi, ńßaiti namakajza mar~…ĺa u r~…ĺ…ôm…ôniaj tu a tad…ômaw nu kanatar~…ĺ, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakar~…ĺuk kar~…ĺisiw. u ńßaiti i kanatar~…ĺ u saajawaj ¶ajaj kau r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw, u kur~…ĺi ku par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺaj misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu kanatar~…ĺ, atu ¶ar~…ĺibb…ôan s…ôa a kakitizaan u saajawaj masa ¶a ¶ajaj a kakitizaan. i **** a mińß ¶aan, ńßaiti sakamu sa sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° a mikir~…ĺim tu i afri ¶an union misir~…ĺu ¶ tu tatiz…ôŇčan nu sakaput a tad…ômaw.ńßaiti u am…ôri ¶a ujza dada Ē~ ° u r~…ĺum…ôniaj a tad…ômaw ku paajawaj nu bina ¶adan pakar~…ĺa tu **% ku *…ôpubr~…ĺi ¶. satuwaj, ujnian a kanatar~…ĺ atu b…ôr~…ĺawaj r~…ĺatino ku tapaŇč u domini ¶an sapar~…ĺańßad sa masazuma ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ńßaiti a amir~…ĺika* u sapakuju ¶a a kanatar~…ĺ, **** a mińß ¶aan tad…ômaw pajmińß ¶aan nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan a kar~…ĺisiw ***, u saadidi Ē~ °aj nisur~…ĺitan tu nipar~…ĺańßadan nu tad…ômaw, i titakit u saadidiaj nipatadasan a kanatar~…ĺ a ¶a ¶aj. **** a mińßa ¶aan, ńßaiti a tad…ômaw par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kabar~…ĺaki niuzip a mińß ¶aan ** ku mińß ¶aan.
